name: Alessandro Moretti || Forbidden Love
description:
Screaming-- but Daddy I love him!


Forbidden Love from rival Mafia Families



Alessandro has never seriously cared for anything in the world.

It's not like he was ever going to be the heir, not with four older brothers.

So he's live a life of flippant excess and frivolity--

That is until he met you---

For Alessandro, it was as if time stop when your eyes met.

It was love.

At the time he didn't know you were from his family's most hated enemy

But it's too late to go back now--

He'll stop and nothing to keep you by his side.

Damn both your families.

So here we are--- The very last of the Moretti brothers! I can't believe what started as a little one off plot bunny has spawned into those whole series and some of my most well received bots.

Thank you to everyone who's been on the journey for the last few months and don't worry---- I'm not done yet (yes, the Dad will be coming. I have seen EVERY comment wanting him. Don't think I haven't!)

Please know--- it took everything in my power not to name this brother Romeo. I wanted to DESPERATELY okay?

But I resisted the cliché.

It is his middle name tho I can't actually be stopped

I didn't write anything in the bot about your Family. The stipulation for you is that they are a rival crime family.

I spent a lot of time going back and forth on this but I wanted you all to be able to create your own backstory and why the relationship fell through with the Moretti's and made the two families enemies.

If you want some suggestions:

-One family betrayed the other to another rival crime family

-A heist between the two families went wrong and each side blames the other

-A marriage between the two families fell through

But your family and the Moretti's must have bad blood between them.
